steps.title: Identify the structural demand
steps.content: The phrase “a type of Chinese landscape painting ______ by the use of blue and green hues” is an appositive renaming “the tradition of qinglü shanshui.” An appositive must function as a noun phrase. A full verb would turn it into a clause, so the blank must be a past participle modifier instead.

steps.title: Apply the structural requirement
steps.content: The past participle “characterized” keeps the appositive as a noun phrase: “a type of Chinese landscape painting characterized by the use of blue and green hues.” The other options use full verbs (is characterized, has been characterized, will be characterized), which would turn the appositive into a clause rather than a noun phrase modifier. That matches choice C — C is correct.
